---
title: "NLP and Jeopardy"
description: "Exploring Jeopardy clues and categories with natural language processing."
image: ../images/jeopardy.png
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show Code"
---

*Work in Progress.*

# Introduction

This project explores Jeopardy clues and categories using natural language processing.
